channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 17.5%.

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
Independent UK Politics: Blair is wrong about my government, Starmer says, as he hits back over Labour criticism
item.description: Blair is wrong about my government, Starmer says, as he hits back over Labour criticism

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Life for Britons is much harder than it used to be – and Blair has ignored that, says Burnham
item.description: Life for Britons is much harder than it used to be – and Blair has ignored that, says Burnham

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I actually think it is the best yet (that is a very low bar to clear!), only because it is at least topical.
Normally, the whole country is talking about war in Iran or Peter Mandelson, and you get a Substack from Ke...
item.description:
I actually think it is the best yet (that is a very low bar to clear!), only because it is at least topical.
Normally, the whole country is talking about war in Iran or Peter Mandelson, and you get a Substack from Ke...

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer defends policy decisions as he hits back at Blair
item.description: Starmer defends policy decisions as he hits back at Blair

item.title: The Guardian: Mitigating Mandelson risks would have been impossible, says former MI6 chief - The Guardian
item.description: Mitigating Mandelson risks would have been impossible, says former MI6 chief - The Guardian

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: And for all the criticism, there is at least substantive response from Burnham, which is a Platonic treatise in comparison.
item.description: And for all the criticism, there is at least substantive response from Burnham, which is a Platonic treatise in comparison.

item.title: BBC Politics: Sturgeon says she was deceived and betrayed over Murrell embezzlement
item.description: Sturgeon says she was deceived and betrayed over Murrell embezzlement

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Sort of love how terrible this is, just near zero effort to get Keir Starmer’s voice right or to construct a serious argument at all:
item.description: Sort of love how terrible this is, just near zero effort to get Keir Starmer’s voice right or to construct a serious argument at all:
